name: open
description: Controls whether the dialog is open or closed.

name: onOpenChange
description: Callback invoked when the open state changes.

name: onClose
description: Additional callback invoked when the dialog closes.

name: title
description: Title text displayed in the dialog header.

name: description
description: Description text displayed below the title.

name: size
description: Controls the maximum width of the dialog.

name: rounded
description: Controls the corner radius of the dialog.

name: actions
description: Array of action buttons to display at the bottom of the dialog.

name: footer
description: Renders a fully custom footer instead of using actions.

name: showCloseButton
description: Whether to show the close (X) button in the top-right of the header.

name: closeOnOverlayClick
description: Whether to close the dialog when the overlay (background) is clicked.

name: closeOnEscape
description: Whether to close the dialog when the Escape key is pressed.

name: children
description: Content to display in the dialog body.
